text: This request is used to verify development fallback behavior for the ai detector route when the local detector process is not running. The payload is intentionally verbose and plain so it remains far above the eighty word minimum enforced by the route and by the upstream detector contract. In this scenario the route should attempt the configured local endpoint, observe an unavailable condition, then automatically call the Hugging Face detector endpoint and return a successful response to the browser instead of service unavailable. We add additional neutral sentences and words to ensure stable deterministic behavior during repeated local checks and to keep this sample clearly above minimum length requirements.
